news.t: Northern Trust Launches Fixed Income ETF Suites

overview.description: The Northern Trust Short-Term Tax-Exempt Bond ETF (TAXS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of US investment grade municipal bonds with maturities of less than five years. Eligible debt securities must be exempt from US federal income taxes and the federal alternative minimum tax. TAXS was launched on Aug 18, 2025 and is issued by Northern Trust.
infoTable: ICE Short Term Focused Municipal Bond Index

data.title: Northern Trust Launches Fixed Income ETF Suites
data.text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Northern Trust Asset Management has launched three suites of fixed income ETFs today. The 11 new ETFs are the first funds under the new Northern Trust ETFs brand. Two suites ...
